article_title: Bylaw 14753 — Housing Agreement (4612, 4664 Lougheed Highway and 2040, 2140 and 2150 Alpha Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Housing Agreement Locks Non-Market Rental Units at Brentwood Development
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council adopted Bylaw 14753 on July 8, 2025, authorizing a legally binding Housing Agreement with Brentwood BT Development Limited requiring affordable, non-market rental units at 4612–4664 Lougheed Highway and surrounding Alpha Avenue parcels.
briefs.action_required: Ensure all required inclusionary non-market rental units are managed and tenanted per the Housing Agreement terms registered on title.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14753 — Housing Agreement (4612, 4664 Lougheed Highway and 2040, 2140 and 2150 Alpha Avenue) Bylaw 2025
